results.compiled_code:
select
    department_id,
    department as department_name
from "instacart_warehouse"."raw"."departments"

with prior as (
    select
        order_id, product_id, add_to_cart_order, reordered, order_number,
        'prior' as source
    from "instacart_warehouse"."raw"."order_products_prior"
),

train as (
    select
        order_id, product_id, add_to_cart_order, reordered, order_number,
        'train' as source
    from "instacart_warehouse"."raw"."order_products_train"
)

select * from prior
union all
select * from train

select
    aisle_id,
    aisle as aisle_name
from "instacart_warehouse"."raw"."aisles"

with day_of_week as (
    select generate_series(0, 6) as order_day_of_week
),
hour_of_day as (
    select generate_series(0, 23) as order_hour_of_day
),
spine as (
    select d.order_day_of_week, h.order_hour_of_day
    from day_of_week d
    cross join hour_of_day h
)

select
    md5(cast(coalesce(cast(order_day_of_week as TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') || '-' || coalesce(cast(order_hour_of_day as TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') as TEXT)) as time_key,
    order_day_of_week,
    -- ASSUMPTION: Instacart does not document the dow mapping; 0/1 are commonly
    -- taken as the weekend based on order-volume patterns. Treat as a guess.
    case order_day_of_week
        when 0 then 'Saturday' when 1 then 'Sunday'  when 2 then 'Monday'
        when 3 then 'Tuesday'  when 4 then 'Wednesday' when 5 then 'Thursday'
        when 6 then 'Friday'
    end as day_name,
    (order_day_of_week in (0, 1)) as is_weekend,
    order_hour_of_day,
    case
        when order_hour_of_day between 5 and 11  then 'Morning'
        when order_hour_of_day between 12 and 16 then 'Afternoon'
        when order_hour_of_day between 17 and 20 then 'Evening'
        else 'Night'
    end as day_part
from spine

select time_key
from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."dim_time"
where time_key is null

select
    time_key as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."dim_time"
where time_key is not null
group by time_key
having count(*) > 1

select
    order_id,
    user_id,
    eval_set,
    order_number,
    order_dow          as order_day_of_week,
    order_hour_of_day,
    days_since_prior_order
from "instacart_warehouse"."raw"."orders"
where eval_set in ('prior', 'train')

select
    product_id,
    product_name,
    aisle_id,
    department_id
from "instacart_warehouse"."raw"."products"

with products as (
    select * from "instacart_warehouse"."staging"."stg_products"
),
aisles as (
    select * from "instacart_warehouse"."staging"."stg_aisles"
),
departments as (
    select * from "instacart_warehouse"."staging"."stg_departments"
)

select
    md5(cast(coalesce(cast(p.product_id as TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') as TEXT)) as product_key,
    p.product_id,
    p.product_name,
    p.aisle_id,
    a.aisle_name,
    p.department_id,
    d.department_name
from products p
left join aisles a       on p.aisle_id = a.aisle_id
left join departments d  on p.department_id = d.department_id

select product_key
from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."dim_product"
where product_key is null

select
    product_key as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."dim_product"
where product_key is not null
group by product_key
having count(*) > 1

-- This model aggregates 33M order-item records and is reused by two downstream models
-- so it is materialised as a table to avoid repeated computation.

select
    order_id,
    count(*)                            as basket_size,
    sum(reordered)                      as num_reordered,
    round(avg(reordered::numeric), 4)   as reorder_ratio
from "instacart_warehouse"."staging"."stg_order_products"
group by order_id

with orders as (
    select * from "instacart_warehouse"."staging"."stg_orders"
),

order_metrics as (
    select * from "instacart_warehouse"."intermediate"."int_order_metrics"
)

select
    o.user_id,
    count(distinct o.order_id)                                          as total_orders,
    round(avg(o.days_since_prior_order), 2)                            as avg_days_between_orders,
    sum(om.basket_size)                                                as total_items_purchased,
    round(avg(om.basket_size), 2)                                      as avg_basket_size,
    round(sum(om.num_reordered)::numeric / nullif(sum(om.basket_size), 0), 4) as reorder_ratio
from orders o
left join order_metrics om on o.order_id = om.order_id
group by o.user_id

select
    md5(cast(coalesce(cast(user_id as TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') as TEXT)) as user_key,
    user_id,
    total_orders,
    avg_days_between_orders,
    total_items_purchased,
    avg_basket_size,
    reorder_ratio
from "instacart_warehouse"."intermediate"."int_user_metrics"

select user_key
from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."dim_user"
where user_key is null

select
    user_key as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."dim_user"
where user_key is not null
group by user_key
having count(*) > 1

with orders as (
    select * from "instacart_warehouse"."staging"."stg_orders"
),
order_metrics as (
    select * from "instacart_warehouse"."intermediate"."int_order_metrics"
)

select
    o.order_id,                                                                 -- degenerate dimension
    md5(cast(coalesce(cast(o.user_id as TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') as TEXT)) as user_key,
    md5(cast(coalesce(cast(o.order_day_of_week as TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') || '-' || coalesce(cast(o.order_hour_of_day as TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') as TEXT)) as time_key,
    o.order_number,
    o.eval_set,
    o.days_since_prior_order,
    om.basket_size,
    om.num_reordered,
    om.reorder_ratio
from orders o
left join order_metrics om on o.order_id = om.order_id

select order_id
from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."fact_orders"
where order_id is null

with child as (
    select user_key as from_field
    from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."fact_orders"
    where user_key is not null
),

parent as (
    select user_key as to_field
    from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."dim_user"
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

select
    order_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."fact_orders"
where order_id is not null
group by order_id
having count(*) > 1

with order_products as (
    select * from "instacart_warehouse"."staging"."stg_order_products"
),
orders as (
    select * from "instacart_warehouse"."staging"."stg_orders"
)

select
    op.order_id,
    op.product_id,
    op.order_number,
    op.add_to_cart_order,
    op.reordered,
    op.source,
    md5(cast(coalesce(cast(op.product_id as TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') as TEXT)) as product_key,
    md5(cast(coalesce(cast(o.user_id as TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') as TEXT))     as user_key,
    md5(cast(coalesce(cast(o.order_day_of_week as TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') || '-' || coalesce(cast(o.order_hour_of_day as TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') as TEXT)) as time_key
from order_products op
inner join orders o on op.order_id = o.order_id


where op.order_number > (select max(order_number) from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."fact_order_items")

select product_key
from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."fact_order_items"
where product_key is null

with all_values as (

    select
        reordered as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."fact_order_items"
    group by reordered

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    '0','1'
)

select time_key
from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."fact_order_items"
where time_key is null

select user_key
from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."fact_order_items"
where user_key is null

with child as (
    select time_key as from_field
    from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."fact_order_items"
    where time_key is not null
),

parent as (
    select time_key as to_field
    from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."dim_time"
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

with child as (
    select product_key as from_field
    from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."fact_order_items"
    where product_key is not null
),

parent as (
    select product_key as to_field
    from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."dim_product"
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

with child as (
    select user_key as from_field
    from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."fact_order_items"
    where user_key is not null
),

parent as (
    select user_key as to_field
    from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."dim_user"
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

with validation_errors as (

    select
        order_id, product_id
    from "instacart_warehouse"."marts"."fact_order_items"
    group by order_id, product_id
    having count(*) > 1

)

select *
from validation_errors
